All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AIcDocumentationBlockElement
Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationBlockElement.
AIcDocumentationCodeBlock
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationCodeBlock.
AIcDocumentationContainerElement
Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationContainerElement.
AIcDocumentationDocument
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationDocument.
AIcDocumentationElement
Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationElement.
AIcDocumentationInlineCode
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationInlineCode.
AIcDocumentationInlineElement
Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationInlineElement.
AIcDocumentationLineBreak
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationLineBreak.
AIcDocumentationLink
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationLink.
AIcDocumentationParagraph
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationParagraph.
AIcDocumentationReference
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationReference.
AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget.
AIcDocumentationSection
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationSection.
AIcDocumentationTable
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTable.
AIcDocumentationTableCell
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableCell.
AIcDocumentationTableColumn
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableColumn.
AIcDocumentationTableRow
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableRow.
AIcDocumentationText
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationText.
AIiDocumentationBlockElement
Represents a block-level documentation element.
AIiDocumentationCodeBlock
Represents a standalone code block.
AIiDocumentationContainerElement
Represents a block-level documentation element that can contain child blocks.
AIiDocumentationDocument
Represents the root of a documentation element tree.
AIiDocumentationElement
Represents a common renderer-neutral documentation element.
AIiDocumentationInlineCode
Represents inline code inside textual content.
AIiDocumentationInlineElement
Represents an inline documentation element.
AIiDocumentationLineBreak
Represents an explicit line break inside inline content.
AIiDocumentationLink
Represents a non-semantic inline link.
AIiDocumentationParagraph
Represents a paragraph with ordered inline content.
AIiDocumentationReference
Represents a semantic inline reference to another documented object.
AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
Represents a renderer-neutral target of a semantic documentation reference.
AIiDocumentationSection
Represents a hierarchical documentation section.
AIiDocumentationTable
Represents a tabular block element.
AIiDocumentationTableCell
Represents a cell in a documentation table row.
AIiDocumentationTableColumn
Represents metadata of a documentation table column.
AIiDocumentationTableRow
Represents a row in a documentation table.
AIiDocumentationText
Represents plain inline text.
